quote: Lindo was a pleasure to work with—soft-spoken, collaborative, and always eager to help. He’s a diligent and dedicated professional who consistently contributes with a positive attitude. I appreciated his willingness to share his expertise and knowledge so freely. Working with him was truly a rewarding experience.
name: Miah D.
position: Software Developer (Intern) at BBD Software Development

quote: I had the pleasure of working with Lindo Matabane at Umuzi/BBD internship where he demonstrated exceptional problem-solving skills and clean coding practices. His ability to debug complex issues and be of help to other developers was invaluable to our team. Lindo is not only technically skilled but also a collaborative team player who brings positivity to every meeting. I’d gladly work with him again and highly recommend them!
name: Mpilo N.

quote: To say I’ve worked with Lindo would be a half truth. To accurately put it would be along the lines of “I’ve been mentored by Lindo”. Although we were fellow students, due to his advanced knowledge he had to hold my hand many a times through my code, help me find never seen before bugs and guide me through peer reviewing code. He always aimed to add value in any group setting. What a joy to have worked with him.
name: Hlobile M.

quote:
I had the pleasure of working with Lindo during a web development training program at Umuzi, where he served as my team lead. He was consistently helpful and supportive, always willing to take the time to walk through challenges and offer thoughtful guidance. His deep knowledge of web technologies and genuine passion for development made him a fantastic resource.
What stood out most was his creative problem-solving. He often approached issues with unique solutions that helped me see things from a new perspective. Our troubleshooting sessions frequently turned into engaging conversations about the broader dev world, where Lindo would share insights from his own projects and offer practical advice tailored to my growth.
Working with him was not only educational but genuinely enjoyable. Anyone would be lucky to have Lindo on their team.
name: Jamie B.
position: Junior Software Developer at Sanlam Investments
